chatParticipants.name: moa
chatParticipants.description: MoA Loop mode (default) — iterative 5-role pipeline until Aggregator naturally converges

disambiguation.description: Multi-perspective analysis with multiple LLM advisors (iterative loop mode)

chatParticipants.name: moaloop
chatParticipants.description: Explicit Loop mode — same as @moa (iterative until Aggregator decides finalize or MAX_ITER)

disambiguation.description: Explicit MoA Loop mode (iterative refinement until natural convergence)

chatParticipants.name: moasingle
chatParticipants.description: Single-shot mode — 1 iteration then forces finalize (faster but may have low confidence if evidence is incomplete)

disambiguation.description: MoA Single-shot mode (fast, 1 iteration only; use @moa or @moaloop for complex tasks)

commands.title: MoA: Configure Models
commands.description: Eight-step flow — (0/7) pick/create/delete preset group, (1/7) refs (checkbox multi-select, 2-8), (2/7) aggregator (single-select checkbox), (3/7) recon agent(s) (multi-select for parallel, or 'Use aggregator' sentinel), (4/7) recon aggregator (single-select, 'Use main aggregator' sentinel), (5/7) planner (single-select, 'Use aggregator' sentinel), (6/7) actor (single-select, 'Use aggregator' sentinel), (7/7) L3 summarizer (single-select + 'Disable L3' sentinel). All steps use checkbox UI for clarity of current selection.

commands.title: MoA: Switch Preset
commands.description: QuickPick to switch the active preset group. Shows all saved presets with a preview of which models they use (refs count + aggregator + recon + reconAgg + planner + actor + L3). One-click switch, no need to re-configure models.

commands.title: MoA: Probe Available Tools (Debug)
commands.description: Lists all tools currently registered in vscode.lm.tools. Use this to check if Copilot/other extensions expose tools that MoA's acting agent could call.

commands.title: MoA: Cleanup Old Tasks (>TTL days)
commands.description: v0.19.1: Remove all MoA task caches older than moa.cacheTtlDays (default 30). Shows a confirmation dialog with the count before deletion. Operates on .moa_cache/ in the current workspace.

commands.title: MoA: Cleanup Current Workspace Tasks
commands.description: v0.19.1: Remove ALL MoA task caches for the current workspace (identified by workspace fingerprint hash). Use this to free disk space when done with a project.

commands.title: MoA: Cleanup All Tasks (High Risk)
commands.description: v0.19.1: Remove ALL MoA task caches (all workspaces). High-risk operation, requires explicit confirmation. Useful for full reset.

languageModelTools.name: moa_recon

prompt.description: The recon task description. e.g. 'gather all code related to MoA recon pipeline'.

scopeHint.description: Optional: hint about what files/symbols to look at. Supports paths with line ranges, e.g. 'src/moaRunner.ts:120-200 src/types.ts'. The tool extracts path:line-line patterns and reads those exact ranges.

includeWorkspaceTree.description: Include the project tree in the result (default true). Useful for giving downstream tools a sense of structure.

maxFiles.description: Maximum number of files to read (default 8, max 20).

languageModelTools.modelDescription: Read-only recon subagent that gathers file contents relevant to a task and returns them as Markdown. Good for inspecting multiple files at once when you need broader context before deeper analysis. USE THIS before calling #moaAnalyze or #moaOrchestrate when the user's question references specific files or code — pass this tool's output as reconContext to ground the MoA analysis. If you only need a single file, prefer copilot_readFile directly.
languageModelTools.userDescription:
MoA recon subagent — read-only file collection. Gathers relevant file contents for the main LLM to inspect or pass forward to moa_analyze.

Workflow (Hermes-style):
1. When the user's question references specific files or code, call moa_recon FIRST with a scopeHint.
2. moa_recon returns file contents as a structured Markdown tool result.
3. Then call moa_analyze with reconContext=<the gathered content from step 2>.

If the user asks a general question without file references, skip moa_recon and call moa_analyze directly — MoA's internal Phase 0 recon will gather files itself.

languageModelTools.name: moa_analyze

prompt.description: The question or task to analyze. Pass the user's original question verbatim.

forceDirect.description: Optional: skip the multi-model consultation and use a single acting agent. Useful when MoA setup is broken or fast single-model analysis is preferred. Default false.

maxReconRounds.description: Optional: override the number of recon rounds (default 3). Lower = faster but less grounded; higher = more thorough but slower/costlier.

collectRawFiles.description: Optional: include a hint in the result to suggest reading source files directly. Default false.

reconContext.description: Pre-collected context (file contents, grep results, etc.) that the calling LLM gathered via its own tool calls (e.g. copilot_readFile). When provided, MoA skips its internal Phase 0 recon and uses this directly as the ref prompt's RECON DATA block. Recommended: call copilot_readFile first to read the relevant file(s), then pass their concatenated contents here. This implements the Hermes-style subagent flow where recon is a separate tool the orchestrator decides to call.

reconSources.description: List of file paths that produced the reconContext (for logging/traceability). Example: ['src/moaRunner.ts', 'src/types.ts'].

languageModelTools.modelDescription: Run SINGLE-SHOT (1 iteration only) 5-role MoA analysis (Planner → Recon → Refs → Aggregator → Actor). Forces finalize after iteration 1 regardless of Aggregator's actual suggestion — completeness may be < 80% if evidence is incomplete. For iterative refinement (let Aggregator decide convergence), USE #moaOrchestrate instead. Good for: single-shot questions needing multi-model reasoning (code review, design trade-offs). NOT for: complex tasks requiring iterative recon refinement. Optional reconContext parameter accepts pre-gathered file contents (e.g. from #moaRecon or copilot_readFile) so refs give grounded analysis.
languageModelTools.userDescription:
Run the MoA 5-role pipeline in SINGLE-SHOT mode (Planner → Recon → Refs → Aggregator → Actor, 1 iteration only). Output is persisted to .moa_cache/<task_id>/ (final.md + timeline.md).

**When to use this vs #moa_orchestrate**:
- `#moa_analyze` — single-shot (fast, but Aggregator may want more iterations)
- `#moa_orchestrate` — iterative loop (Aggregator decides convergence, more thorough)

**Recommended workflow (Hermes-style subagent)**:
1. Call #moaRecon first to gather relevant file contents
2. Pass that content as reconContext=<markdown content> to #moaAnalyze
3. MoA refs see the pre-collected context and produce grounded analysis

For simple questions, answer directly without MoA.

**Intermediate output**: VSCode Output panel (View → Output) shows per-role channels: MoA Planner / MoA Recon / MoA Refs / MoA Aggregator / MoA Actor.

languageModelTools.name: moa_orchestrate

task.description: The task to orchestrate through the iterative MoA loop. Should be the user's full original request, including any relevant context.

languageModelTools.modelDescription: Launch a multi-round Mixture-of-Agents orchestration loop for complex tasks that need iterative refinement. Good for: research with multiple unknowns, multi-file refactoring plans, design decisions with trade-offs, anything where a single MoA pass won't be enough. Each round runs N worker LLMs in parallel + an aggregator that fuses outputs and identifies gaps. When gaps need external info, you (the main agent) call #runSubagent to fill them and feed results back via #moaContinue. Loop stops at completeness ≥ 0.8 or 12 iterations, then you call #moaFinalize to get action items. USE THIS instead of #moaAnalyze when the task is hard enough to need 3+ rounds of refinement. For simple single-shot analysis, prefer #moaAnalyze.
languageModelTools.userDescription:
Start a new iterative MoA orchestration loop (v0.12.0). The orchestrator runs worker LLMs + aggregator in a multi-round loop, persisting state to .moa_cache/<task_id>/. Each iteration may produce gaps that need recon; when that happens, the result tells you to call #runSubagent and then #moa_continue.

Use this for complex tasks that require iterative refinement: research, multi-file refactoring plans, design decisions with trade-offs. Unlike moa_analyze (single-shot), this tool loops until completeness ≥ 0.8 or max 12 iterations.

Workflow:
1. Call #moa_orchestrate(task) → get task_id + initial status
2. Loop: if status='awaiting_recon', call #runSubagent with the provided prompt, then #moa_continue(task_id, subagent_result=<runSubagent output>); if status='running', just call #moa_continue(task_id)
3. When status='finalized' or you want to stop, call #moa_finalize(task_id) → get action_items
4. Execute action_items using your own tools (writeFile, execute, etc.)

Models used: moa.refModels (workers) + moa.aggregator (aggregator/finalizer). Configure via 'Moa: Configure Models' command.

languageModelTools.name: moa_continue

subagent_result.description: Optional: result from #runSubagent that fills the gaps identified in the previous iteration. Omit if no recon was needed (status='running').

languageModelTools.modelDescription:
Advance an MoA orchestration loop by one iteration (started via #moaOrchestrate). Use this to drive the loop forward. Two modes:
- If the previous status was 'awaiting_recon': you MUST first call #runSubagent with the gaps prompt provided in the previous result, then pass its output here as subagent_result.
- If the previous status was 'running': just call this with task_id only (no subagent_result) to advance another round.
Continue calling until status='finalized' or you decide to stop, then call #moaFinalize.
languageModelTools.userDescription:
Advance the MoA orchestration loop by one iteration (v0.12.0). Run this after #moa_orchestrate to advance. If the previous status was 'awaiting_recon', you MUST have called #runSubagent first and pass its output as subagent_result. Otherwise, omit subagent_result to advance without new recon.

The result includes the current synthesis, completeness, gaps, and next-step instruction.

languageModelTools.name: moa_finalize
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Force-finalize an MoA orchestration loop and produce concrete action items. Use this when the loop has converged (previous status was 'finalized') OR when you want to stop early and get the current best answer. Returns action_items to execute: write_file (with target=path and full content), execute (target=shell command), create_roadmap (target=plan title), research_more (target=follow-up topic), inform_user (target=subject + message). After receiving action_items, execute them using your own tools (copilot_createFile for files, run_in_terminal for commands, etc.).
languageModelTools.userDescription:
Force-finalize an MoA orchestration loop and produce action items (v0.12.0). Call this when the loop has converged (status='finalized') OR when you want to stop early. Returns a JSON-shaped Markdown with: summary, action_items[{type, target, content, rationale}], confidence, unresolved.

Action item types: write_file (target=path, content=full text), execute (target=command), create_roadmap (target=title), research_more (target=topic), inform_user (target=subject).

After receiving action_items, execute them using your own tools (writeFile, run_in_terminal, etc.).

languageModelTools.name: moa_execute

task_id.description: The task_id of a finalized MoA task (must have a final.json with action_items).

languageModelTools.modelDescription: v0.20.0: Run Actor on the finalized action_items of a task. Equivalent to what the user does manually by writing files / running commands — but safer (SafeExecutor backs up every change). Subject to the approvalMode gate: if 'batch' or 'batch_plus_per_call', a QuickPick is shown listing action_items; if 'per_call', each destructive tool call is gated. Skip this tool when executionPreset='autopilot' (already runs automatically after finalize).
languageModelTools.userDescription:
Execute the action_items stored in final.json of a finalized MoA task (v0.20.0). Requires #moa_finalize to have been called first. Subject to approval gates defined by executionPreset (default: batch QuickPick multi-select). Use after #moa_finalize when executionPreset='manual'. Skipped automatically when executionPreset='supervised'/'autopilot'/'yolo'.

Returns a summary with executed_actions [{status, action.type, target, error_message, artifacts}] and a pointer to <taskDir>/autopilot.log for full details.

moa.refModels.description:
Reference advisor models (equal-mode MoA). Each item: {role, model}. All refs share the same prompt (moa.sharedRefPrompt); `role` is a display label only, NOT a role specialization. Use 'Moa: Configure Models' command to set this interactively.

---

参考顾问模型列表（等权 MoA 模式）。每项格式：{role, model}。所有 ref 共用同一个 prompt（moa.sharedRefPrompt）；`role` 仅作显示标签，不参与角色特化。建议通过 'Moa: Configure Models' 命令交互式配置。

role.description:
Display label (e.g. 'advisor_1'). Not injected into prompt.

显示标签（如 'advisor_1'）。不会注入到 prompt 中。

model.description:
Substring to match vscode.lm model name, e.g. 'GLM-5.2'

vscode.lm 模型名称的子串匹配，如 'GLM-5.2'

systemHint.description:
Deprecated in v2 (equal mode). Kept for backward compat, ignored at runtime.

v2 等权模式下已弃用。仅为向后兼容保留，运行时被忽略。
systemHint.deprecationMessage:
Equal-mode MoA ignores per-ref systemHint. Use moa.sharedRefPrompt instead.

等权 MoA 忽略每个 ref 的 systemHint。请改用 moa.sharedRefPrompt。

moa.aggregator.description:
Aggregator (synthesizer) model. Use 'Moa: Configure Models' command to set interactively.

聚合器（综合者）模型。建议通过 'Moa: Configure Models' 命令交互式配置。

model.description:
Substring to match vscode.lm model name.

vscode.lm 模型名称的子串匹配。

temperature.description:
Informational only (vscode.lm doesn't expose per-call temp yet).

仅供参考（vscode.lm API 暂未开放 per-call temperature）。

moa.parallelRefs.description:
Fan out reference advisors in parallel (Promise.allSettled). When true (default), all ref requests fire simultaneously → wall-clock time = slowest ref. When false, refs run sequentially (safer for providers that rate-limit concurrent requests). NOTE: pre-v0.14.14 this setting existed but was never read by code; v0.14.14 makes it actually work.

---

并行扇出参考顾问（Promise.allSettled）。**true**（默认）= 所有 ref 请求同时发出，wall-clock 时间 = 最慢的那个 ref。**false** = 串行执行（对限制并发请求的 provider 更安全）。注：v0.14.14 之前该配置存在但代码从未读取；v0.14.14 起才真正生效。

moa.parallelRecon.description:
Fan out Recon agents in parallel when preset.reconModels has 2+ models. When true (default), all recon agents run simultaneously → wall-clock time = slowest. When false, or when only 1 recon model is configured, runs sequentially (single-model mode) and Recon Aggregator is auto-disabled. Parallel recon produces N independent results that are merged by Recon Aggregator (pure LLM integration, no tool calls) into a single summary before injecting to Refs.

---

当 preset.reconModels 有 2+ 个模型时并行扇出 Recon 代理。**true**（默认）= 所有 recon 代理同时运行，wall-clock = 最慢者。**false** 或只配置了 1 个 recon 模型时，串行运行（单模型模式），Recon Aggregator 自动禁用。并行 recon 产生 N 个独立结果，由 Recon Aggregator（纯 LLM 整合，无工具调用）合并成单一 summary 后注入 Refs。

moa.presets.description:
Named preset groups. Each value is a full pipeline config: {name, refModels, aggregator, reconModel, l3Summarizer, description?}. Switch active preset via 'Moa: Switch Preset' command. Legacy flat config (moa.refModels + moa.aggregator + ...) is auto-migrated to presets.default on first use.

---

命名预设组。每个值是完整的流水线配置：{name, refModels, aggregator, reconModel, l3Summarizer, description?}。通过 'Moa: Switch Preset' 命令切换激活的预设。旧的扁平配置（moa.refModels + moa.aggregator + ...）会在首次使用时自动迁移到 presets.default。

moa.activePreset.description:
Key into moa.presets identifying the currently active group. Switch via 'Moa: Switch Preset' command. When the referenced preset doesn't exist, falls back to the first available preset, then to legacy flat config.

---

moa.presets 中标识当前激活组的 key。通过 'Moa: Switch Preset' 命令切换。当引用的预设不存在时，按顺序 fallback：第一个可用预设 → 旧的扁平配置。

moa.sharedRefPrompt.description:
Optional override for the shared prompt prepended to every ref query. If empty (recommended), uses the built-in Hermes _REFERENCE_SYSTEM_PROMPT ported from NousResearch/hermes-agent. All refs get the SAME prompt — diversity comes from model differences, not role assignment.

---

可选：覆盖每个 ref 查询前置的共享 prompt。**留空（推荐）** = 使用内置的 Hermes _REFERENCE_SYSTEM_PROMPT（移植自 NousResearch/hermes-agent）。所有 ref 拿到的是**同一个** prompt —— 多样性来自模型差异，而非角色分配。

enumDescriptions:
Hermes-style: refs shown only as progress indicators ('Ref advisor_1 thinking...'). Detailed ref output goes to the 'MoA Bridge — Ref Output' panel. Ref content does NOT enter chat history — only the aggregator synthesis does. Matches Hermes' design where refs are side-channel advisory calls.

---

Hermes 风格：ref 只显示为进度指示（'Ref advisor_1 thinking...'）。详细 ref 输出写入 'MoA Bridge — Ref Output' 面板。**ref 内容不进入 chat history** —— 只有 aggregator 综合结果进入。符合 Hermes 设计：ref 是侧信道咨询调用。

⚠️ WARNING — context pollution risk. Legacy: refs stream inline as markdown in the chat response. Visible AND recorded in chat history. This means ALL ref outputs (potentially thousands of tokens × N refs × M iterations) accumulate in Copilot's context window, causing context bloat, slower follow-ups, and potential aggregator confusion (aggregator should read in-memory JSON, not chat-text refs). Use this only if you explicitly need Copilot follow-ups to reference individual ref opinions.

---

⚠️ 警告 —— 上下文污染风险。遗留模式：ref 以 markdown 内联流式输出到 chat 响应。可见 **且** 记入 chat history。这意味着所有 ref 输出（可能数千 token × N 个 ref × M 轮迭代）会累积到 Copilot 的上下文窗口，导致上下文膨胀、后续 follow-up 变慢、甚至 aggregator 混乱（aggregator 应该读内存中的 JSON，而非 chat 正文里的 ref）。仅当你明确需要 Copilot follow-up 引用单个 ref 意见时才用此模式。
moa.refDisplayMode.description:
How to display reference advisor output in the chat UI. **'thinking' (default, STRONGLY RECOMMENDED)** keeps refs out of chat history (Hermes-style); aggregator reads in-memory ref results only. **'verbose'** streams refs inline as markdown — ⚠️ WARNING: pollutes Copilot context, may cause aggregator confusion. Change only if you fully understand the trade-off.

---

参考顾问输出在 chat UI 的显示方式。**'thinking'（默认，强烈推荐）** 让 ref 不进 chat history（Hermes 风格），aggregator 只读内存中的 ref 结果。**'verbose'** 把 ref 以 markdown 内联流式输出 —— ⚠️ 警告：会污染 Copilot 上下文，可能导致 aggregator 混乱。仅当你完全理解权衡时才修改。

moa.enableActingAgent.description:
Enable the 3-layer Hermes architecture. When true, the aggregator's output becomes guidance for an acting agent that can call tools (read_file, find_files, apply_patch, run_in_terminal, etc.) to actually accomplish the user's task. When false, falls back to v0.7.x 2-layer behavior (aggregator output IS the final answer). Requires copilot_* tools to be registered (default when GitHub Copilot Chat is active).

---

启用 3 层 Hermes 架构。**true** = aggregator 的输出成为 acting agent 的指导，后者可调用工具（read_file / find_files / apply_patch / run_in_terminal 等）真正完成用户任务。**false** = 回退到 v0.7.x 的 2 层行为（aggregator 输出即最终答案）。需要 copilot_* 工具已注册（GitHub Copilot Chat 激活时默认满足）。

moa.enableActorInLoop.description:
Enable the Actor role in the 5-role Loop mode (moaOrchestrator). When false (default), Actor is skipped and Aggregator's actor_needed suggestion is downgraded to recon_needed. When true, Actor executes action_items using the acting agent loop. Independent from moa.enableActingAgent (which controls single-shot Hermes mode in moaRunner). Default false for safety — Actor has side effects (file writes, terminal commands).

---

在 5 角色 Loop 模式（moaOrchestrator）中启用 Actor 角色。**false**（默认）= Actor 被跳过，Aggregator 的 actor_needed 建议被降级为 recon_needed。**true** = Actor 通过 acting agent 循环执行 action_items。与 moa.enableActingAgent（控制 moaRunner 单次 Hermes 模式）独立。默认 false 以策安全 —— Actor 有副作用（写文件、跑终端命令）。

moa.safeExecutionMode.description:
v0.19.1: When true (default), Actor's tool calls are wrapped by SafeExecutor: write_file/delete operations are backed up to .bak.<timestamp> before execution, all side-effecting actions are logged to .moa_cache/<task_id>/manifest.json. When false, Actor executes tools directly without backup/manifest. Default true for safety.

---

v0.19.1：**true**（默认）= Actor 的工具调用被 SafeExecutor 包装：write_file/delete 操作执行前备份到 .bak.<时间戳>，所有副作用操作记录到 .moa_cache/<task_id>/manifest.json。**false** = Actor 直接执行工具，无备份无清单。默认 true 以策安全。

moa.cacheTtlDays.description:
v0.19.1 (rev v0.20.2): Tasks older than this TTL (in days) will be cleaned up when running the 'MoA: Cleanup Old Tasks' command. Default 30 days. **Set to 0 to disable TTL cleanup entirely** (tasks are never auto-deleted; you must manually remove .moa_cache/). Maximum raised from 365 to 36500 (~100 years) in v0.20.2 for long-term archival needs.

---

v0.19.1（v0.20.2 修订）：超过此 TTL（天）的任务会在运行 'MoA: Cleanup Old Tasks' 命令时被清理。默认 30 天。**设为 0 完全禁用 TTL 清理**（任务永不自动删除，需手动删除 .moa_cache/）。v0.20.2 将上限从 365 提高到 36500（约 100 年），满足长期归档需求。

moa.cacheRootDir.description:
v0.19.1: Override the cache root directory. Default empty (uses <workspaceFolder>/.moa_cache/). Set to an absolute path to centralize all MoA task caches.

---

v0.19.1：覆盖缓存根目录。默认空（使用 <workspaceFolder>/.moa_cache/）。设为绝对路径可跨工作区集中存储所有 MoA 任务缓存。

enumDescriptions:
manual（默认，v0.19.x 兼容）：finalize 后只返回 markdown 给主会话，需要用户/主会话显式调用 #moa_execute 才会执行 action_items。approvalMode=batch、safeMode=true。

English: manual (default, v0.19.x-compatible): finalize returns markdown only; user/main session must call #moa_execute explicitly. approvalMode=batch, safeMode=true.

supervised（半自动 + 人工审批）：finalize 后自动执行 action_items，但每个 action 执行前会弹 QuickPick 让用户多选/反选。safeMode=true。

English: supervised (semi-auto + human approval): auto-executes after finalize, but QuickPick multi-select pops up before each round. safeMode=true.

autopilot（全自动，推荐用于可信 CI/重试流水线）：finalize 后自动执行，无任何审批弹窗。安全网 = SafeExecutor 自动备份 (.bak.<时间戳>)。用户仍可从 .moa_cache/<task_id>/manifest.json 审计。

English: autopilot (fully auto, recommended for trusted CI/retry pipelines): auto-executes after finalize, zero popups. Safety net = SafeExecutor automatic .bak.<timestamp> backup. Auditable via manifest.json.

yolo（极端，仅沙盒/CI）：全自动 + 完全关闭 SafeExecutor 备份。任何变更不可逆。UI 会显示警告。

English: yolo (extreme, sandbox/CI only): fully auto + SafeExecutor backup OFF. All changes irreversible. UI shows a warning.

custom（自定义）：手动控制下方 3 个细粒度配置 (autoExecuteAfterFinalize / approvalMode / safeExecutionMode)，executionPreset 字段本身被忽略。

English: custom: control 3 fine-grained configs (autoExecuteAfterFinalize / approvalMode / safeExecutionMode) independently; executionPreset itself is ignored.
moa.executionPreset.description:
v0.20.0：顶层执行模式快捷方式。选择一个 preset 即可覆盖最常见的 autoExecute + approvalMode + safeMode 组合。设为 custom 可独立控制 3 个细粒度配置。详见下方 'Actor execution control' 章节（README）。

---

English: v0.20.0: Top-level execution mode shortcut. Pick a preset to cover the most common autoExecute + approvalMode + safeMode combinations. Set to 'custom' to control the 3 fine-grained configs independently. See 'Actor execution control' section in README for details.

moa.autoExecuteAfterFinalize.description:
v0.20.0：true = finalizeTask 自动调用 Actor 执行 final.json 的 action_items（受 approvalMode 约束）。false = finalize 只返回 markdown，主会话需显式调用 #moa_execute。

⚠️ 仅在 executionPreset='custom' 时生效；其他 preset 会覆盖此值。

---

English: v0.20.0: When true, finalizeTask() automatically invokes Actor to execute final.json's action_items (subject to approvalMode). When false (default), finalize returns markdown and main session must call #moa_execute explicitly.

⚠️ Only effective when executionPreset='custom'; other presets override this value.

enumDescriptions:
none（不弹窗）：完全依赖 SafeExecutor 备份作为安全网。建议仅与 safeMode=true 一起使用。

English: none (no popups): rely solely on SafeExecutor backup. Recommended only with safeMode=true.

batch（默认，Gate-A 批量审批）：每次 Actor 调用入口弹 QuickPick 多选框，列出所有 action_items，用户可反选不想要的项。

English: batch (default, Gate-A batch approval): QuickPick multi-select at each Actor entry, listing all action_items. User can deselect unwanted items.

per_call（Gate-B 逐次审批）：每个破坏性工具调用前（write_file / delete / execute）弹 Yes/No/Yes to All/Reject All 对话框。

English: per_call (Gate-B per-call approval): Yes/No/YesToAll/RejectAll dialog before each destructive tool call (write_file / delete / execute).

batch_plus_per_call（双门，最保守）：Gate-A 入口批量 + Gate-B 每次破坏性调用前。

English: batch_plus_per_call (both gates, most conservative): Gate-A batch at entry + Gate-B before each destructive call.
moa.approvalMode.description:
v0.20.0：审批门模式，控制破坏性 Actor 工具调用在执行前如何被门控。

⚠️ 仅在 executionPreset='custom' 时生效；其他 preset 会覆盖此值。

---

English: v0.20.0: Approval gate mode controlling how destructive Actor tool calls are gated before execution.

⚠️ Only effective when executionPreset='custom'; other presets override this value.

moa.enableRecon.description:
Enable the recon phase (Phase 0). When true, a recon agent runs BEFORE ref fan-out to collect files relevant to the user's question (read_file, find_files, grep, get_errors, search_codebase). The collected raw context is injected into ref prompts so refs can give grounded analysis instead of guessing. When false, skips recon — refs see only workspace context (v0.8.0 behavior).

---

启用 recon 阶段（Phase 0）。**true**（默认）= recon 代理在 ref 扇出**前**运行，收集与用户问题相关的文件（read_file / find_files / grep / get_errors / search_codebase），原始上下文注入 ref prompts，让 ref 给出有依据的分析而非猜测。**false** = 跳过 recon，ref 只能看到 workspace 上下文（v0.8.0 行为）。

moa.maxReconRounds.description:
Maximum number of recon rounds. Each round = 1 recon pass + N ref fan-out. If refs report 'sufficient=false' in their JSON output, the next recon round uses their 'missing' hints to fill gaps. Loop exits early when a majority of refs say sufficient=true. v0.20.1 raised hard cap from 5 to 10; v0.20.2 raised further to 20 for deep research workflows.

---

最大 recon 轮数。每轮 = 1 次 recon 通道 + N 个 ref 扇出。若 refs 在 JSON 输出中报告 'sufficient=false'，下一轮 recon 会用它们的 'missing' 提示填补缺口。当多数 refs 表示 sufficient=true 时提前退出。v0.20.1 上限从 5 提到 10；v0.20.2 进一步提到 20 以支持深度研究工作流。

moa.reconContextChars.description:
[DEPRECATED — 不再作上限 / No longer a cap]: 仅作为审计指标记录到 meta.json。原 v0.13.0 用于总字符预算截断，v0.14.5 起完全不再截断 —— refs 单轮无历史 + 1M 上下文模型可以消化任意大小；如果 recon 真爆了说明检索方向出问题（噪声过多），是 LLM 该处理的不是工程层该截断的。保留此配置仅为向后兼容。

English: Kept for backward compat only. Original v0.13.0 role (character budget truncation) was removed in v0.14.5 — refs are single-turn history-less and 1M-context models can digest any size. If recon truly overflows, that's a search-direction problem for the LLM, not a truncation problem.

moa.forceDirect.description:
⚠️ WARNING — bypasses multi-model safety net. Skip the entire recon/ref/aggregator pipeline. The acting agent receives only the user prompt + workspace context and acts directly (no multi-model consultation). Useful ONLY when the user has had repeated multi-model failures and just wants a single competent model to handle the task with full tool access. With forceDirect=true, you lose: (1) cross-model verification, (2) recon-collected evidence, (3) aggregator synthesis. Use sparingly.

---

⚠️ 警告 —— 绕过多模型安全网。跳过整个 recon/ref/aggregator 流水线。acting agent 只拿到用户 prompt + workspace 上下文就直接行动（无多模型协商）。**仅在**用户反复遭遇多模型失败、只想用单一强力模型 + 完整工具权限处理任务时使用。开启 forceDirect=true 后你会失去：(1) 跨模型校验、(2) recon 收集的证据、(3) aggregator 综合。慎用。

moa.maxReconIterations.description:
Recon agent 单次任务的最大工具调用迭代数（兜底硬上限）。默认 50。v0.20.1 提高上限到 200；v0.20.2 进一步提高到 500（超大型 monorepo 或深度研究任务可能需要）。实际多数任务会在 LLM 自主判断 + 早停机制触发后更早收敛。配置项 moa.reconEarlyStopStagnant / moa.reconEarlyStopSaturated 控制主动早停。

---

English: Hard cap on recon agent tool-call iterations per task. Default 50. v0.20.1 raised cap to 200; v0.20.2 raised further to 500 (very large monorepos or deep research tasks). Most tasks converge earlier via LLM self-judgment + early-stop heuristics (see moa.reconEarlyStopStagnant / moa.reconEarlyStopSaturated).

moa.reconAllowTerminal.description:
允许 recon agent 使用 terminal 类工具（runInTerminal / sendToTerminal / killTerminal）。默认 false（安全为先）。Debug 工作流需要 recon 跑测试/编译时设为 true。注意：prompt 会指示 recon 避免破坏性命令（rm -rf / git push --force 等），但最终取决于模型遵循度。

---

English: Allow recon agent to use terminal tools (runInTerminal / sendToTerminal / killTerminal). Default false (safety-first). Set true for debug workflows where recon needs to run tests/compilation. Note: prompt instructs recon to avoid destructive commands (rm -rf / git push --force etc.), but ultimately depends on model compliance.

moa.reconEarlyStopStagnant.description:
Recon 早停阈值 —— 连续 N 轮工具签名（工具名+输入摘要）完全相同 → 触发早停（防死循环）。默认 2。v0.20.2 上限从 10 提高到 50。设大可让 recon 更'耐心'，设小可更激进省成本。

---

English: Recon early-stop threshold — stop after N consecutive identical tool signatures (tool name + input summary). Default 2. v0.20.2 raised max from 10 to 50. Larger = more 'patient' recon; smaller = more aggressive cost saving.

moa.reconEarlyStopSaturated.description:
Recon 早停阈值 —— iterations > 5 后，单轮新增 capturedToolCalls 字符数 < 此值持续 N 轮（N 同 reconEarlyStopStagnant）→ 触发早停（信息饱和）。默认 200 字符。v0.20.2 上限从 5000 提高到 50000。

---

English: Recon early-stop threshold — after iterations > 5, if new capturedToolCalls chars per round < this value for N consecutive rounds (N = reconEarlyStopStagnant), trigger early stop (info saturation). Default 200 chars. v0.20.2 raised max from 5000 to 50000.

moa.reconL3Threshold.description:
L3 孙代理触发阈值。单个文件超过此字符数且为代码文件时，才派 L3 做内容精选（保留关键函数）。v0.14.4 默认从 60k 提升到 200k —— 现代 LLM 1M 上下文，绝大多数文件无需精选。只有真正巨型文件（如生成的 schema、minified bundle）才需要 L3。v0.20.2 minimum 从 50000 降到 10000，允许更激进触发。

---

English: L3 grandchild trigger threshold. A single file must exceed this char count AND be a code file to trigger L3 summarization (key-function extraction). v0.14.4 raised default from 60k to 200k — modern 1M-context LLMs rarely need L3. Only truly huge files (generated schemas, minified bundles) need it. v0.20.2 lowered minimum from 50000 to 10000 for more aggressive triggering.

moa.reconL3MaxCalls.description:
单次 MoA 任务最多派多少个 L3 孙代理。超出后即使文件超大也降级为 L2 语义边界截断。设 0 完全禁用 L3。默认 5（兼顾效果与成本）。v0.20.2 上限从 20 提高到 100。

---

English: Max L3 grandchild calls per MoA task. Beyond this, even huge files degrade to L2 semantic-boundary truncation. Set 0 to fully disable L3. Default 5 (balance of effect and cost). v0.20.2 raised max from 20 to 100.

moa.reconL3TargetChars.description:
L3 孙代理对单个大文件精选后的目标输出长度（字符）。默认 50k —— v0.14.3 是 10k，过度压缩。1M 上下文模型完全可以消化 50k 的精选结果。v0.20.2 加上 maximum=500000 上限。

---

English: L3 grandchild target output length (chars) for each large file. Default 50k — v0.14.3 was 10k (over-compressed). 1M-context models easily digest 50k digests. v0.20.2 added maximum=500000 cap.

moa.reconModel.description:
Recon agent 专用模型配置。model 字段为 vscode.lm 模型 ID（如 gcmp.zhipu:::GLM-5.2-CodingPlan）。空字符串 = fallback 到 aggregator 模型（保持 v0.13.x 行为）。通过 'Moa: Configure Models' 命令的 Step 3/7 设置（v0.18.2+ 支持多选并行，见 moa.presets.reconModels）。

---

English: Recon agent model config. The `model` field is a vscode.lm model ID (e.g. gcmp.zhipu:::GLM-5.2-CodingPlan). Empty string = fallback to aggregator model (v0.13.x behavior). Set via 'Moa: Configure Models' Step 3/7 (v0.18.2+ supports multi-select parallelism, see moa.presets.reconModels).

model.description:
Recon 模型 ID。空 = 复用 aggregator（向后兼容）。

English: Recon model ID. Empty = reuse aggregator (backward compat).

temperature.description:
保留字段（vscode.lm API 暂未使用）。

English: Reserved field (vscode.lm API doesn't use this yet).

moa.l3Summarizer.description:
L3 孙代理（大文件精选器）模型配置。model 字段为 vscode.lm 模型 ID。空字符串 = 禁用 L3（所有大文件降级为 L2 语义边界截断）。推荐 MiniMax-M3 (TokenPlan)。通过 'Moa: Configure Models' 命令的 Step 7/7 设置。

---

English: L3 grandchild (large-file summarizer) model config. The `model` field is a vscode.lm model ID. Empty string = disable L3 (all large files degrade to L2 semantic-boundary truncation). Recommended: MiniMax-M3 (TokenPlan). Set via 'Moa: Configure Models' Step 7/7.

model.description:
L3 模型 ID。空 = 禁用 L3。

English: L3 model ID. Empty = disable L3.
